input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8256 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.parquet:parquet-jackson:1.16.0; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Tests should target the shaded.parquet.com.fasterxml.jackson.* APIs, not unshaded com.fasterxml.jackson.* dependencies.

Behavior changed from the existing 1.12.2 baseline because Parquet moved from Jackson 2.11.4 to 2.19.2; old assertions about Jackson annotation introspection may be invalid even though no setup is missing.

Existing tests use --add-opens for some reflective/internal coverage, but ordinary ObjectMapper/JsonFactory serialization and deserialization coverage does not require additional environment variables, system properties, Docker, or Maven dependencies.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is required. org.apache.parquet:parquet-jackson:1.16.0 is a self-contained shaded Jackson bundle: its published POM removes Jackson runtime dependencies after shading, the resolved JAR embeds relocated Jackson 2.19.2 classes under shaded.parquet.com.fasterxml.jackson.*, and jdeps shows only JDK module dependencies. Meaningful coverage is reachable with normal in-process tests using the relocated Jackson APIs.
